title: The House Next Door: Meet the Blacks 2
original_title: The House Next Door: Meet the Blacks 2
overview: Bestselling author Carl Black moves his family back to his childhood home, he must team up with oddball neighbors to do battle with a pimp, who may or may not be an actual vampire.
